//w/0---
title: "analysis"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}
Nch= 20

fs = 50e3
nsamples= 100
noise=1e-4 *fs/nsamples
```


```{r}
filenames=c(
  "../data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_NR",
  "../data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_MNR",
  "../data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_R",
  "../data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_MR",
  "../data/figure_1_likelihood_diagnostic_IR",
  "../data/figure_1_simulation"

)

algorithms=c("NR"
             ,"MNR"
             ,"R"
             ,"MR"
             ,"IR"
             ,"SIM")

```


```{r}

d=data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(filenames)){
  
  d0=read.csv(paste0(filenames[i],".csv"), check.names = FALSE) 
  d0$algo=algorithms[i]
  d=rbind(d,d0)
}

```

```{r}
d_MR=d%>%filter(algo=="MR", scope=="evolution", value_row==1, is.na(value_col), !is.na(step_start))%>%mutate(component= component_path %>%
           str_replace("^Algo_State_Dynamic\\.", "") %>%
           str_replace("^Patch_State\\.", ""))%>%
  select(sample_index,step_start,step_middle,step_end,component,value_row,value_col,value)%>%pivot_wider(names_from = component, values_from = value)
d_IR=d%>%filter(algo=="IR", scope=="evolution", value_row==1,  is.na(value_col), !is.na(step_start))%>%mutate(component= component_path %>%
           str_replace("^Algo_State_Dynamic\\.", "") %>%
           str_replace("^Patch_State\\.", ""))%>%
  select(sample_index,step_start,step_middle,step_end,component,value_row,value_col,value)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = component, values_from = value)

d_R=d%>%filter(algo=="R", scope=="evolution", value_row==1,  is.na(value_col), !is.na(step_start))%>%mutate(component= component_path %>%
           str_replace("^Algo_State_Dynamic\\.", "") %>%
           str_replace("^Patch_State\\.", ""))%>%
  select(sample_index,step_start,step_middle,step_end,component,value_row,value_col,value)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = component, values_from = value)

d_NR=d%>%filter(algo=="NR", scope=="evolution", value_row==1,  is.na(value_col), !is.na(step_start))%>%mutate(component= component_path %>%
           str_replace("^Algo_State_Dynamic\\.", "") %>%
           str_replace("^Patch_State\\.", ""))%>%
  select(sample_index,step_start,step_middle,step_end,component,value_row,value_col,value)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = component, values_from = value)

#%>%select(step_start,step_middle,step_end)


d_s=d%>%filter(algo=="SIM", scope=="simulation_sub")%>%select(sub_index,sample_index,step_start,step_middle,step_end,component_path,value)%>%pivot_wider(names_from = component_path, values_from = value)
```


```{r}
common_theme = theme_classic()+ theme( legend.position = "right")

compact_theme <- common_theme +theme(
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
  legend.position = "right",
  plot.margin = margin(1, 5, 1, 5)
)
x_only_ticks=theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank())
y_only_ticks=theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank())
no_y_axis= theme( axis.text.y = element_blank(), # Removes y-axis text
         axis.title.y = element_blank(), # Removes y-axis title
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.y = element_blank())
no_x_axis= theme( axis.text.x = element_blank(), # Removes y-axis text
         axis.title.x = element_blank(), # Removes y-axis title
          axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.x = element_blank())
y_no_title=theme(axis.title.y = element_blank())


xmin=min(d$step_start)
xmax=max(d$step_end)

dx=xmax-xmin
x_scale<-scale_x_continuous(limits = c(xmin-0.05*dx, xmax+0.05*dx))


d_step_IR=0.1
d_step_MR= 0.1
```


```{r}
d_p_IR=0.004*diff(range(-d_s$patch_current/Nch))

```


```{r, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
d_step_IR=0
d_step_MR= 0

MR_color_plot<- c(
      "current"   = "#009E73",
      "prior"     = "#999999",  # Light Grey
      "posterior" = "#000000",  # Strong Black
      "Markov"    = "#0072B2",  # Deep Blue
      "Markov_on_prior" ="#0072B2",
      "Bayes"     = "#E69F00", 
      "next_measure" ="darkblue"
    )


MR_bayes_color<-scale_color_manual(
    values =MR_color_plot,
    breaks = c("current","prior", "posterior","Markov", "Markov_on_prior","Bayes","next_measure"),
    labels = c("Simulated Current","Prior Point State", "Posterior Point State", "Markov Prediction", "Markov Prediction on Prior", "Bayesian Update", "Next Measure")
  ) 

  MR_bayes_guides<-guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = c(NA,16, 16, NA, NA), 
                                                linetype = c(1,0, 0, 1,1))))
 

  IR_color_plot<- c(
      "current"   = "#009E73",
      "prior"     = "#999999",  # Light Grey
      "prior_state"     = "#999999",  # Light Grey
      "posterior" = "#000000",  # Strong Black
      "posterior_state" ="#000000",
      "Markov"    = "#0072B2",  # Deep Blue
      "Bayes"     = "#E69F00", 
      "next_measure" ="darkblue"
    )


IR_bayes_color<-scale_color_manual(
    values =IR_color_plot,
    breaks = c("current","prior", "prior_state","posterior","posterior_state", "Markov", "Bayes"),
    labels = c("Simulated Current","Prior Point State","Prior Boundary State", "Posterior Point State","Posterior Boundary State", "Markov Prediction", "Bayesian Update")
  )

  # boundary-state endpoints: start = hollow circle (1), end = solid circle (16)
  IR_boundary_shape <- scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("start" = 1, "end" = 16),
    breaks = c("start", "end"),
    labels = c("start", "end"),
    name = NULL)

  IR_bayes_guides<-guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1, override.aes = list(shape = rep(NA, 4),
                                                linetype = c(1,1,1,1))),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(color = "black", linetype = 0)))

  # leave a small gap so the Bayes arrows stop short of the boundary circles/lines (tune arrow_gap)
  arrow_gap = 0.008
  shr_a <- function(y0, y1) y0 + pmin(arrow_gap, 0.35*abs(y1-y0))*sign(y1-y0)  # start, pulled toward the end
  shr_b <- function(y0, y1) y1 - pmin(arrow_gap, 0.35*abs(y1-y0))*sign(y1-y0)  # end, pulled toward the start
  d_IR <- d_IR %>% mutate(
    bayes0_y    = shr_a(lag(P_mean_t20_y1), P_mean_t10_y1),
    bayes0_yend = shr_b(lag(P_mean_t20_y1), P_mean_t10_y1),
    bayesA_y    = shr_a(lag(P_mean_t20_y1)*0.75 + P_mean_t11_y0*0.25, P_mean_t10_y1*0.75 + P_mean_t20_y1*0.25),
    bayesA_yend = shr_b(lag(P_mean_t20_y1)*0.75 + P_mean_t11_y0*0.25, P_mean_t10_y1*0.75 + P_mean_t20_y1*0.25),
    bayesB_y    = shr_a(lag(P_mean_t20_y1)*0.5  + P_mean_t11_y0*0.5,  P_mean_t10_y1*0.5  + P_mean_t20_y1*0.5),
    bayesB_yend = shr_b(lag(P_mean_t20_y1)*0.5  + P_mean_t11_y0*0.5,  P_mean_t10_y1*0.5  + P_mean_t20_y1*0.5),
    bayesC_y    = shr_a(lag(P_mean_t20_y1)*0.25 + P_mean_t11_y0*0.75, P_mean_t10_y1*0.25 + P_mean_t20_y1*0.75),
    bayesC_yend = shr_b(lag(P_mean_t20_y1)*0.25 + P_mean_t11_y0*0.75, P_mean_t10_y1*0.25 + P_mean_t20_y1*0.75),
    bayes1_y    = shr_a(P_mean_t11_y0, P_mean_t20_y1),
    bayes1_yend = shr_b(P_mean_t11_y0, P_mean_t20_y1))
 

  no_legend<-theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  # MR arrows: Bayes (vertical) absolute gap; Markov (diagonal) fractional gap (aspect-invariant)
  markov_f = 0.08
  d_MR <- d_MR %>% mutate(
    bayesM_y    = lag(P_mean_t2_y1) + pmin(arrow_gap, 0.35*abs(P_mean_t1_y1 - lag(P_mean_t2_y1)))*sign(P_mean_t1_y1 - lag(P_mean_t2_y1)),
    bayesM_yend = P_mean_t1_y1      - pmin(arrow_gap, 0.35*abs(P_mean_t1_y1 - lag(P_mean_t2_y1)))*sign(P_mean_t1_y1 - lag(P_mean_t2_y1)),
    markov_x    = step_start   + markov_f*(step_end-step_start),
    markov_xend = step_end     - markov_f*(step_end-step_start),
    markov_y    = P_mean_t1_y1 + markov_f*(P_mean_t2_y1 - P_mean_t1_y1),
    markov_yend = P_mean_t2_y1 - markov_f*(P_mean_t2_y1 - P_mean_t1_y1))

g_MR<-ggplot(d_MR) +
    
  #0. set the measurment intervals
#  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = step_start), linewidth = 1.2, alpha= 0.6, color="grey", linetype=3)+  
  # 1. Current data (Black bars)
  geom_line(data=d_s, aes(x=step_middle, y=-patch_current/Nch, color="current"), 
                linewidth = 0.5) +
# geom_segment(data=d_s, aes(x=step_start, xend=step_end, y=-patch_current/Nch, color="current"), 
#                linewidth = 0.8) +
#    geom_segment(data=d_s, aes(x=step_end, xend=step_end, y=patch_current/-Nch, yend=-lead(patch_current)/-Nch, color="current"), linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  # 2. Auxiliary Markov Path (Dashed/Faint)
  # This represents what the model would predict if it didn't update from data
 # geom_segment(aes(x = step_start , 
#                   y = lag(P_mean_t2_y1),
#                   xend = step_end - d_step_IR * (step_end - step_start), 
#                   yend = P_mean_t2_y0, color="Markov_on_prior"), 
#                alpha = 0.6, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.8,
#               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.070, "in"))) +

  # 3. Main Markov Prediction Path (Solid Blue)
  geom_segment(aes(x = markov_x,
                   y = markov_y,
                   xend = markov_xend,
                   yend = markov_yend, color = "Markov"),
               linewidth = 1, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.10, "in"))) +

  # 4. Bayesian Update Arrows (Gold)
  # We make these slightly thicker to show the 'work' the data is doing
  geom_segment(aes(x = step_start ,
                   y = bayesM_y,
                   xend = step_start ,
                   yend = bayesM_yend-1e-9, color = "Bayes"),
               linewidth = 1, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.10, "in"))) +

  # 5. Connecting Markov Step (Horizontal transition)
 # geom_segment(aes(x = step_end, 
#                   y = P_mean_t2_y1,
#                   xend = lead(step_start) , 
#                   yend = P_mean_t2_y1, color="next_measure"),linetype = 3,  
#               linewidth = 0.5) +

  # 6. Points (Last layer so they sit on top of the arrows)
  geom_point(aes(x = step_start , y = lag(P_mean_t2_y1), color = "prior"), size = 2) +
 # geom_point(aes(x = step_end, y = P_mean_t2_y0, color = "prior"), alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = step_start , y = P_mean_t1_y1, color = "posterior"), size = 2) +
#  geom_point(aes(x = step_end, y = P_mean_t2_y1, color = "posterior"), size = 2) +

  # --- Scales and Themes ---
  x_scale +
  common_theme +
  ylab("open state\nprobability") +
  xlab("time (s)") +
   MR_bayes_color+MR_bayes_guides +theme(legend.position = "inside",legend.position.inside = c(0.8,0.2), legend.title = element_blank())
g_IR<-
    

  ggplot(d_IR) +
 # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = step_start), linewidth = 1.2, alpha= 0.6, color="grey", linetype=3)+  
    # 1. Background Data
   geom_line(data=d_s, aes(x=step_middle, y=-patch_current/Nch, color="current"), 
                linewidth = 0.5) +
# geom_segment(data=d_s, aes(x=step_start, xend=step_end, y=-patch_current/Nch, color="current"), 
 #               linewidth = 0.8) +
#    geom_segment(data=d_s, aes(x=step_end, xend=step_end, y=patch_current/-Nch, yend=-lead(patch_current)/-Nch, color="current"), linewidth = 0.8) +
   
    # 2. Point states (prior/posterior) — superseded by boundary-state endpoint markers below
   # geom_point(aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=lag(P_mean_t20_y1), color="prior"), size = 2) +
   # geom_point(aes(x=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=P_mean_t11_y0, color="prior"), size = 2) +

   # geom_point(aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=P_mean_t10_y1, color="posterior"), size = 2) +
   # geom_point(aes(x=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=P_mean_t20_y1, color="posterior"), size = 2) +
    
    # 4. Bayesian Update Arrows (Thicker Gold)
  #  geom_segment(aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=bayes0_y,
  #                   xend=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), yend=bayes0_yend, color="Bayes"),
   #              linewidth = 0.7, arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.1,"in"))) +

    # Intermediate Bayesian Arrows
    geom_segment(aes(x=(step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.75 + (step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.25,
                     y=bayesA_y,
                     xend=(step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.75 + (step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.25,
                     yend=bayesA_yend, color="Bayes"),
                 alpha=1, linewidth = 0.8, arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in"))) +

    geom_segment(aes(x=(step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.5 + (step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.5,
                     y=bayesB_y,
                     xend=(step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.5 + (step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.5,
                     yend=bayesB_yend, color="Bayes"),
                 alpha=1, linewidth = 0.8, arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in"))) +

    geom_segment(aes(x=(step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.25 + (step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.75,
                     y=bayesC_y,
                     xend=(step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.25 + (step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start))*0.75,
                     yend=bayesC_yend, color="Bayes"),
                 alpha=1, linewidth = 0.8, arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in"))) +
    
    #geom_segment(aes(x=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=bayes1_y,
     #                xend=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), yend=bayes1_yend, color="Bayes"),
      #           linewidth = 1, arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in"))) +

    # 5. Markov and Posterior Connections
    geom_segment(aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=P_mean_t10_y1,
                     xend=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), yend=P_mean_t20_y1, color="posterior_state"), alpha=1,linetype = "solid", linewidth = 1) +

    geom_segment(aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=lag(P_mean_t20_y1)+d_p_IR,
                     xend=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), yend=P_mean_t11_y0+d_p_IR, color="prior_state"),linetype = "solid",               linewidth = 1) +

    # Boundary-state endpoints: hollow circle = start, solid circle = end (grey = prior, black = posterior)
    geom_point(aes(x=step_start, y=P_mean_t10_y1,             color="posterior_state", shape="start"), size = 2.5) +
    geom_point(aes(x=step_end,   y=P_mean_t20_y1,             color="posterior_state", shape="end"),   size = 2.5) +
    geom_point(aes(x=step_start, y=lag(P_mean_t20_y1)+d_p_IR, color="prior_state",     shape="start"), size = 2.5) +
    geom_point(aes(x=step_end,   y=P_mean_t11_y0+d_p_IR,      color="prior_state",     shape="end"),   size = 2.5) +

   # geom_segment(aes(x=step_start+d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=lag(P_mean_t20_y1)-d_p_IR*2,
  #                   xend=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), yend=P_mean_t11_y0-d_p_IR*2, color="Markov"),
  #               linewidth = 0.5, arrow=arrow(length=unit(0.07,"in"))) +

    geom_segment(aes(x=step_end-d_step_IR*(step_end-step_start), y=P_mean_t20_y1,
                     xend=lead(step_start)+ d_step_IR*(lead(step_end)-lead(step_start)), yend=P_mean_t20_y1, color="next_measure"),linetype = 3,
                 linewidth = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +

    # --- Scales and Themes ---
    x_scale +
    common_theme + no_y_axis + xlab("time (s)") + IR_bayes_color+IR_boundary_shape+IR_bayes_guides+theme(legend.position = "inside",legend.position.inside = c(0.8,0.2), legend.title = element_blank())

g_MR| g_IR

  ggsave("Figure_1.pdf", width = 12, height = 6)
```
